text: General AI, or Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), refers to a machine that can understand and learn any intellectual task like a human. While today's AI is narrow, AGI could potentially solve major problems like climate change or diseases. However, experts also warn of serious risks, including job loss and misuse of powerful technology. Predictions about when we will achieve AGI vary widely; some believe it could happen within the next decade, while others think it may take fifty years or more. In any case, careful planning and ethical guidelines will be essential to manage both the benefits and dangers of this transformative technology.
